REUSABLE STEREOTOMY

Block Definition

Live

Sine Wave Joint

GEOMETRY WORKSPACE

Vault Designer

Surface ready

Set the vault family, then resolve its construction logic, solid form, force-flow field, and default course layout. This workspace deliberately stops before block generation.

Logic
↓
023D Solid
Geometry
↓
03Force-Flow
Field
↓
04Default Course
Layout
Scaffold hidden.
No blocks generated. The active vault surface is ready for downstream block design.

Project / Source

Barrel and Groin remain built-in host geometries. Uploaded models are optional hosts or references for strategy development.

Uploaded Host Geometry

Optional Host Workflow Import reference or host geometry when needed. Strategies can still be authored from built-in vault fields without uploaded files.
Host Surface Library Save imported host geometry here so it can be reused without browsing for the original file.
3D
No saved host selected Save or select a host surface to see file details.
Type: n/a Triangles: n/a Last used: n/a
Inactive
Import a host file to save it.
Use uploads for host geometry, reference dimensions, or explicit topology. The core strategy can remain procedural: host field, topology field, block component, and mapping controls.
Source Transform
Pipeline idle.

Workflow

Vault Form

Geometry
Structure
Form Display

Stereotomy Strategy

Strategy Presets + Topology
Custom Panel Component Upload a panel or block module to map across the active host surface using the selected component mapping mode.
No custom panel loaded.
Panel Library Two repositories: uploaded panel files, and designed block systems from Block Designer.
PNL
No saved panel selected Save or select a panel asset to see file details.
Type: n/a Faces: n/a Last used: n/a
Inactive
Import a panel or tile design to save it.
TIL
No designed block selected Save a custom block from Block Designer to store it here.
Type: n/a Joint: n/a Last used: n/a
Inactive
Designed blocks from Block Designer appear in this repository.
Custom Panel Parameters Control custom imported panel count, mapped depth, and thickness behavior from the mapping strategy.
Panel Variants + Transforms Build a reusable panel family and let mapping assign variants by boundary, support, keystone, or curvature conditions.
Base variant active.
Attractor Capability Declare the safe parameter this panel family exposes to the attractor field. The carrier-cell boundary always stays fixed.
Perforation response is boundary-locked.
Fields + Zones
Top-View Attractor Editor
Place controls in the UV / top-view diagram Add a point, or draw a curve with successive clicks. Select and drag any visible control handle to reposition it. Press Enter or Finish Curve to complete a curve.
Select Add Point or Draw Curve, then click in the top-view diagram.
Topology Lattice
Shared-edge lattice Generates continuous U/V rails from the active quad carrier. Attractors reduce rail width locally to open the lattice without shifting cell boundaries.
Top / U Layer
Bottom / V Layer
Structural Strip Bindings Duplicate selected continuous topology loops using the same face-anchor rule as the U/V rails.
Uses shared carrier edges; no imported panel mesh is required.
Contours, Masks + Streamlines
Block Size
Joints + Fabrication Rules
Trait / Development
2D Strategy Editor
Alignment Overrides
Fabrication Package
Package contents Exports include strategy settings, host dimensions, topology graph, block solids, labels, assembly order, tolerances, and merged fabrication mesh when enabled.

Analysis
